calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On January 2. 2003
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Anthony L. Head, Esq. for plaintiff, Fund Recovery Services, Inc., Susan Tang, of Baay Media Federal Credit Union is sworn and examinrd. After hearing all of the evidence the Court grants the judgment in favor of the plaintiff, and against the defendant, Maurice Rice individually, as follows: Principal: $31,279.39; Interest to date: $6,108.241; Costs: $143.00; Statutory Attorneys fees: $660.00 for a total judgment of $38,186.63. Prevailing party is to submit a judgment for signature. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2002 Continued To Feb-07-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Text Ruling
